title: anthemis marocana subsp. aguilarii
intro: Anthemis marocana subsp. aguilarii, also known as Moroccan chamomile, is a subspecies of Anthemis marocana, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Moroccan chamomile include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting a good night's sleep. The herbal preparations of Anthemis marocana subsp. aguilarii typically include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
